summary: Completed testing of iteration 28 - P1 Backend Refactoring, WebSockets, Email, and File Upload features. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend features verified.

issues: Footer not visible on login page (by design - footer is part of DashboardLayout for authenticated pages only)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Backend Refactoring complete. Services package created with email_service.py, file_service.py, websocket_service.py. All new endpoints tested and working.

email_service.details: POST /api/email/test endpoint exists and requires master_admin role. Returns 200 when email service is configured. Emailit integration ready.

file_upload_service.details: POST /api/upload/profile-picture and POST /api/upload/general endpoints exist and require authentication. Cloudinary integration ready.

websocket_status_api.details: GET /api/ws/status endpoint returns connection statistics. Requires admin role. Returns total_users, total_connections, and role-based counts.

websocket_connection.details: WebSocket endpoint at /ws/{user_id} exists. Frontend WebSocketContext.jsx handles connection with JWT auth. Notification bell shows connection status indicator.

notification_bell.details: Notification bell visible in header for super_admin and master_admin. Shows WebSocket connection status (green dot for connected, gray for offline). Dropdown shows real-time status.

dashboard_tabs_for_members.details: Regular members see 4 tabs (Overview, Profit, Trades, Charts) on dashboard. All tabs are clickable and show different content. Admin dashboard does NOT show these tabs.

footer_visibility.details: Footer visible on all authenticated pages (dashboard, profit tracker, trade monitor, etc.). Shows copyright text, Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Contact links, and 'Made with Emergent' badge. Footer NOT on login page (by design).

p0_features.details: All P0 features still working: auth, profit summary, trade logs, active signal, admin notifications.

api_tests.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - Master admin and member login works
api_tests.GET /api/ws/status: PASS - Returns WebSocket connection stats, requires admin

ui_tests.login_page: PASS - Shows CrossCurrent branding, customizable title/tagline/notice
ui_tests.admin_dashboard: PASS - Shows admin sidebar with Members, Trading Signals, Team Analytics, Transactions. No member tabs.
ui_tests.member_dashboard: PASS - Shows 4 tabs (Overview, Profit, Trades, Charts). All tabs clickable and functional.
ui_tests.notification_bell: PASS - Visible for admins, shows WebSocket connection status
ui_tests.footer: PASS - Visible on authenticated pages with copyright and links

services_package.email_service.py: Emailit integration with send_email, get_license_invite_email, get_admin_notification_email, get_password_reset_email, get_trade_alert_email
services_package.file_service.py: Cloudinary integration with upload_file, upload_profile_picture, upload_deposit_screenshot, delete_file, get_user_files
services_package.websocket_service.py: WebSocket connection manager with notify_admins_deposit_request, notify_admins_withdrawal_request, notify_user_transaction_status, notify_trade_signal, notify_system_announcement
